roadmap.milestone: M2 — The NL→RDF upgrade (AGORA protocol document, RDF/SHACL-native)
roadmap.note: The NL→RDF translator + SHACL-bodied, hash-pinned Protocol Document + the upgrade-handshake codec. Builds on M1 (@jeswr/solid-agent-card) AgentDescriptor.protocolSources. SEPARATE-CODEBASE — zero prod-solid-server core risk (the translation/validation/codec is a client-side library; no networking or server change). The runtime carrier is a separate @jeswr/solid-agent package.
